channel.title: Go Error Handling on In Jim's Personal Opinion
channel.description: Recent content in Go Error Handling on In Jim's Personal Opinion

item.title: Extended Error Use Case: errclass
item.description: Let’s build the errclass package on top of the generic error wrapper created previously.

item.title: A Generic Go Custom Error Wrapper
item.description: Let’s build a custom error that uses generics to add type-safe sidecar data.
